---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Command

The exact command that triggered the bug (redact any real PII from file names or content):

```bash
uv run anon.py <file> [args]
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error output or traceback:

```
paste traceback here
```

## Environment

- AnonShield version / git commit:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- OS:
- GPU (if applicable):
- File format being processed:

## Additional context

Any other relevant information (file size, anonymization config used, etc.).
